en.title: Emoji writing
en.prompt: Please edit the following passage using the Emoji style, which is characterized by captivating headlines, the inclusion of emoticons in each paragraph, and the addition of relevant tags at the end. Be sure to maintain the original meaning of the text. Please begin by editing the following text: [text to rewrite as xiaohongshu style]

related.title: Writing assistant
related.remark: For optimising the grammar, clarity and conciseness of text and improving readability.

related.title: Nature Style Editing
related.remark: Polish according to the style of Nature, or provide a writing style to emulate. Contributed by @Pfyuan77.

related.title: Spoken script
related.remark: write scripts for live broadcasts, videos, podcasts and other types of spoken content. Contributed by @Bettycroco.

metaDescription: Need more fun text? Add headlines, emoticons, and tags. Rewrite content in a lively Emoji style without changing meaning.

faq.q: Can the Xiaohongshu-style rewrite actually go viral?
faq.a: The form mimics it (lots of emoji, short sentences, hashtags), but viral content relies on a "unique perspective" rather than emoji stacking. Use it for format packaging. The core topic and personal angle must come from you, otherwise it reads like mass-produced AI content.

faq.q: How do I switch to Weibo or Douyin style?
faq.a: Replace Emoji style in the prompt with the target: "Weibo trending style (150-character short post + hashtag + image suggestion)" or "Douyin caption style (conversational + hook + call to action)." Platform algorithms and reading contexts differ, styles vary significantly.
